## Fixes

- **The meeting input meter now reflects system audio, not just your mic.** Audio playing inside your Mac (the other side of a call, media, anything the app is recording) now moves the level meter in the title bar — previously it stayed flat unless you were talking into the mic, even though that audio was being recorded and transcribed.
- **The push-to-talk dictation waveform is now easier to see.** The bars were barely leaving the baseline for normal speech; they now respond more strongly and are taller, so the overlay clearly shows it's picking up your voice.
